query:
SELECT bi.id, bi.externalId, bi.invoiceDate, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.invoiceNumber = 'ST7906' OR bi.description LIKE '%ST7906%'
ORDER BY bi.id;
command:
